---
title: "Trends in information visualization for software analysis and development"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
  - name: Peter Drahoš
  - name: Martin Sperka
date: "2014-01-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  doi: "10.1201/b17801"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1201/b17801"
  isbn: "9781315722481"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1201/b17801](https://doi.org/10.1201/b17801)
